_comment: Run config for run_llm.py. Open slots pinned to DeepInfra fp8 (qwen-72b = the exact exp_01 anchor endpoint; qwen3-32b same provider+quant, thinking disabled -> the 'standard ~30B' slot). Frontier slots present but DISABLED (run_frontier=false) per decision 2026-07-20: open models first; frontier later, possibly sample/hard-cases-only. Verified via /endpoints 2026-07-20; authoritative cost from usage.cost.

models._note: replaced qwen3-32b 2026-07-20: DeepInfra ignored reasoning.enabled=false and hidden thinking consumed the whole token budget (3/40 smoke calls empty, 5.3k reasoning tokens). Gemma is natively non-thinking = clean 'standard ~30B' slot; both were named §6 candidates.
reasoning-off mode; enable after open-model results (O2: alternate anthropic/claude-sonnet-5)
reasoning-on mode; possibly sample or hard-cases-only per decision 2026-07-20
added 2026-07-22: non-thinking Instruct variant; extends the open ladder 27->72->235B

_r3_note: added 2026-07-20 per METHODOLOGY sec.12 escape hatch (R2 beat R1): identification scaffold — per-word verb inventory, closed byt/aby lists, accounting invariant. Smoke: 20/20 parse-ok (after llm_io scanner fix).
_formulations_note: r0_production_verbatim.txt = optional reference arm, add to the map to run
_r4_note: added 2026-07-21: R3 + pairing fixes (Katka's K10 elimination algorithm for rel-prons, preposition rule, same-clause discipline, predicate uniqueness). Provenance: docs/KATKA_K10_relative_pronouns_2026-07-21.md
_r5_note: added 2026-07-21: R4 + pair-level precision surgery (instrumental test, same-clause hard rule, KROK5 aby-enforcement) + Katka wording fixes. FP attribution showed ~90% of false flags are fabricated pairs, verdict tone untouched.
